description: Create a content slide on digital transformation milestones with a full-width horizontal timeline/process flow showing Web 1.0 to Web 3.0 evolution and key technology milestones.

header.kicker: 3. Digital Transformation – The digital economy is here
header.headline: Digital Transformation has changed everything and is set to continue, as digital options follow an exponential growth path

steps.label: Web 1.0
steps.sub: QR-code; Linux; Google; Search engine; DVD; VoIP

steps.label: Web 1.0 / Web 2.0
steps.sub: Online auction; amazon.com; E-Commerce; File sharing; Open source; Online banking; Bluetooth; WLAN; Blogs

steps.label: Web 2.0
steps.sub: facebook; Samsung; Alibaba.com; Tencent; Baidu; Social networking; Smart device; Free and open software; NFC; iOS; Micro blogging; GPS on smartphones; Android; E-Reader; Streaming services; Skype; UMTS

steps.label: Web 2.0
steps.sub: Big Data; Crowd funding; Crowd sourcing; Gamification; Video-on-demand; Cloud; Open innovation; Apps & app stores; Tablets; Individualization of search results; E-Books

steps.label: Web 3.0
steps.sub: Self organizing machines; Learning machines; Crowd investing; 3D scanner; 3D print; Application software defined structures; Augmented reality; Blue Tooth Low Energy (BLE); Quantum computing; Bitcoin; Dark Web; Industry 4.0; Internet of Things; Remote working; Sensor technology; Robotics; Humanoid intelligence
